details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux and then directly to the Makefile at https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile. It used pinchtab snap to extract the page content and correctly identified VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0 from the actual page data, also noting EXTRAVERSION = -rc5. The answer is complete and based on actual page content, not hallucinated.
